last_item: FINAL Mode-S convergence pass (iter 27). Backlog actionable-empty (NEEDS-BACKEND backup-badge item + low/watch copy nits). Ran the 5-agent parallel discovery panel, same coverage as iters 15-26, HIGH bar + full shipped/rejected digest: (1) Dashboard+Query, (2) Roles+Backups+BackupStorageForm, (3) Alerts+Migrate, (4) Settings+DatabaseTuning+Pooler+Login, (5) nav/IA+first-run+cross-view consistency.
last_result: CONVERGED. Four agents hard-converged (each re-verified the shipped safeguards against the source). The Dashboard/Query agent floated ONE candidate that collapsed as a FALSE PREMISE on code inspection (self-rejected, no panel, iter-7/14/26 precedent): change the Dashboard Disk StatCard danger threshold `diskPct > 90` -> `>= 90` to 'match the backend health verdict', self-rated medium on a 'card shows NEUTRAL color while badge shows Needs-attention' framing. FALSE: backend flags `pct >= 90.0` (handlers_dashboard.go:127) -> red badge + a 'disk nearly full' health_reasons line; the frontend card (Dashboard.tsx:150) is `diskPct > 90 ? 'danger' : diskPct > 80 ? 'warn' : 'neutral'`, so at exactly diskPct===90.0 the card is WARN (yellow), NOT neutral (90>80 is true). The load-bearing word ('neutral') is false: card already attention-tinted + red badge + named Callout reason = three concurrent signals, nothing hidden. Stripped of the framing it's 'turn the card red at the single float value 90.0' -- a practical no-op (real disk_used/disk_total*100 essentially never lands on exactly 90.000) that would de-align the disk gauge from its three siblings (CPU/Mem/Connections all use `>`, an independent gradient heuristic, not a mirror of the backend binary verdict). No code shipped, docs-only commit, no hard gates needed. Per the contract (stable_streak >= 3) the UX has converged: wrote scripts/ralph-ux/COMPLETE.md, committed, and STOPPED the loop. Final tally: 12 real improvements shipped, 8 rejected (3 on restraint, 5 on false premise), capability parity held (146 Vitest tests), parked NEEDS-BACKEND + low/watch items documented.
notes: PURE UX-IMPROVEMENT LOOP -- NOW COMPLETE (converged at iter 27, stable_streak 3/3). Sibling of the COMPLETED scripts/ralph/ shadcn-migration track. Capability parity is sacred (Vitest suite is the contract); layout/flow/copy are free to change. Restraint over churn -- rejecting a change and recording why is a normal outcome. Frontend/UX only, never touch Go. go build is blocked in-sandbox (snap-confine); run with sandbox disabled. TO RESTART: if new views/flows ship or backend capabilities land (e.g. target-health on GET /config), delete COMPLETE.md and run a fresh Mode-S seed pass to repopulate backlog.md.
north_star: The indiepg panel is the easiest, clearest, safest way for an indie hacker to run their Postgres -- minimal surface, co-located workflows, honest state, no over-design. CONVERGED (stable_streak >= 3).
